audit_items.proof_trace: The invariant holds by design. At line 271, the only gate on `isAssetOutPriceValid` resets `eligibleAssetsIdx` (new auctions) but never touches `endedAuctionsIdx`. Ended auctions accumulate via the time-elapsed branch (`auctionStart + duration < block.timestamp`) which has no price dependency, and `_onAuctionEnd` (lines 383-397) performs oracle-free token transfers to fixed trusted addresses.
